entry.title: SAP PM - WCM, In the maintenance order level work approval icon set as default in T_code IW31
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We have requirement that business team wants Work Approval icon set default at T_code IW31 screen.

Generally, when we tick on permit button and we select the WCD application and after that Work Approval icon will be appears but requirements that can we freeze at main screen without selecting the WCD

 

Thank You

entry.title: Re: Discover how SAP Cloud ALM facilitates seamless change control management process (APAC)
entry.content:
Q&A during the session

QuestionAnswer 
Is it possible to create, release, and deploy transports in any status? Additionally, can we restrict these actions to specific users only?

Please kindly check the status flow in below link, it described  which actions you can perform in the respective statuses： Status Flow for Features

For Roles and Authorizations control, please refer here.

We are completing our Pilot release and soon we will proceed with next release . How the Retrofit will be managed using CALM ?Retrofit feature is still under development, we plan to release it later this year.
Once the changes deployed in quality system, how the Defects/ correction will be handled. in solman we have a separate transaction for defect correction . here it will be very challenging to create a feature for every defect and move it to the target sytem. this will make system very complex and we may loose the control over change. if there are 100 defect and 100 features. so kindly suggest a strategy to handle this situation.Different Feature types like Normal change, Urgent change in SAP Solution Manager is planned this year, now you can use Tags to distinguish the different feature.

How the Transport Related checks will be handled during Quality system movement ?

Cross -REf, Downgrade, ATC Critical object, CSOL ?

We currently only support transports check for production. The ATC check and CSOL planned this year.
Can we also create TR in sap PO system via calm？Currently, we only support create transports for CTS-managed transports. No plan to support other transport creation. Please create idea in our Influence program.
Can we configure ITSM in Cloud ALM？ITSM is not planned in SAP Cloud ALM, however you can connect other ITSM tools to SAP Cloud ALM through API.

entry.title: Edit journal entry when processor approval Verify General Journal Entries
entry.content:
Dear experts,

Since T-code FBV0 can no longer be used in the public cloud, we are now using the app 'Verify General Journal Entries For Requester' to submit journal entries, which are then approved and posted by the processor.

Currently, the client requests that, similar to T-code FBV0, journal entries can be manually modified during the processor review before posting. Could you suggest how to configure in the public cloud to allow the functionality where parked journal entries can be modified before posting, as was possible with FBV0 in the previous HANA version? Thank you so much.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Re: Pessimistic Locking between different OData-Requests...
entry.content:
Hi Matthias,

Maybe you should look on the topic locking not as a part of the data model but as a part of the application. What is unsafe about it, if one application is using pessimistic and another one optimistic locking on the same data? The final goal is to protect your data from inconsistency. Both locking types do the job.

The thing you must take care of in your stateless app is the scenario that the data is locked via ENQUEUE and it cannot be saved right away. Here, the draft table of RAP does the job for saving the data temporary and commit it later.

Sorry for this answer, but the locking via ENQUEUE is meant to be used in an application per user. I doubt that there is a safe way to get around this like you are trying to do. The code of the blog post you are refering to is not safe - and I am not even talking about "clean core".

Regards

Stefan

entry.title: Re: Goods movement not possible with mvmt type 704
entry.content:
For MI10 did you consider using physical inventory BAPI?

  • 2554230 - Create physical inventory document via BAPI - SAP ERP & SAP S/4 HANA 
  • BAPI_MATPHYSINV_COUNT
    BAPI_MATPHYSINV_POSTDIFF

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: requirement to create maetrial during award from ariba
entry.content: the requirement is when the RFP is awarded for new material to buy. the buyer need the material to be created in same time during the PO replication from ARIBA to S4HANA. do you have any specific requirement on this part and what is your recommendation ?

entry.title: SuccessFactors AI - AI-Assisted Interview Feedback Insights (Set up and hints)
entry.content:
With the new AI function for Recruiting Interview Feedback Insights we deliver more AI options in H12025.

 

To get Interview Feedback Insights activated you have to do some steps.

1. Fullfill the pre-requisites: you have to use the licenses for AI Units, you use the Interview Central and you have enabled View Candidate Rating in the JobRequisition template.

2. Activate the function

With the AI Units you will find a new admin page in SuccessFactors where you can activate AI Scenarios (AI Service Administration). Grant the permissions to this page to your user to manage the AI Scenarios.

Here you have to activate Assisted Interview Feedback Insights.

3. Provide Permission to the people who should be allowed to use the function and who are able to see the interview feedback in overall.

 

Result:

People are now able to see a summary of interview feedbacks from the feedback givers.

Option 1 - via "View Candidate Ratings"

 

 

Option 2 - via the application (forwards to View Candidate Ratings)

 

 

********Other SuccessFactors RCM AI Blogs********

SuccessFactors AI - Job Description Enhancement (S... - SAP Community

SuccessFactors AI - AI based Skill-Topics in Recruiting (Set up and hints)

entry.title: Automating S/4HANA Cloud UI Deployment via CI/CD Pipeline
entry.content:
I'm currently developing an OnStack Extension on the S/4HANA Public Cloud. This includes a UI generated using SAP Fiori Elements. The development takes place in VSCode. For deployment to the S/4HANA Cloud, the @SAP/ux-ui5-tooling npm package is used, specifically the command fiori deploy --config ui5-deploy.yaml.

The current ui5-deploy.yaml looks as follows:

specVersion: "3.1"
metadata:
  name: xxx
type: application
builder:
  customTasks:
    - name: ui5-tooling-transpile-task
      afterTask: replaceVersion
      configuration:
        debug: true
        transformModulesToUI5:
          overridesToOverride: true
    - name: deploy-to-abap
      afterTask: generateCachebusterInfo
      configuration:
        target:
          url: xxx
          authenticationType: reentranceTicket
        app:
          name: xxx
          description: xxx
          package: xxx
          transport: xxx
        exclude:
          - /test/
          - /*.ts
  resources:
    excludes:
      - /test/**
      - /localService/**

This means that the deployment is currently executed in the user context using a reentrance ticket. Now, I want to automate the deployment via a CI/CD pipeline (either Azure DevOps or SAP CI/CD Service).

The challenge is that a reentrance ticket cannot be generated in an automated context. My idea was to use a technical user, but I couldn’t find a suitable Communication Scenario that would support this kind of deployment.

What would be the best way to accomplish this?

entry.title: Re: Internal Server Error in SAP Build Work Zone: Seeking Resolution
entry.content:
Hi @Joni ,

Thanks for responding, by enabling Identity Authentication in Build work zone is working for us. Thanks for providing the solution.

Thanks and Regards,

Madhav

entry.title: Single Sign On - all Hybrid SAP landscape - One Identity
entry.content:
Hello,

We are reviewing the possibilities of configuring one identity to enable single sign on all SAP ecosystems (cloud and onpremise systems). 
Has anyone configured it in the way that users logs in automatically to both SAP cloud systems as well as on premise systems without having to provide credentials again?

Do we have a procedure or guide to understand what and how this can be done using IAS and Azure Entra as our corporate ID.

Appretiate your inputs in this regards.

Thank you.

Regards,

Vasu

Diagnose

Fehler beim Zugriff über HTTP

    500 (internal server error)
    "Could not sync PCL clock with SAP clock in last24 hours (Cannot load time from SAP system because

entry.title: Re: Edit journal entry when processor approval Verify Gen...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP community blog.

Since transaction code FBV0 is not available in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, the standard process now goes through the "Verify General Journal Entries for Requester" app. The requester creates and saves the entry, and the processor reviews it in "My Inbox" before posting.

The client wants to bring back the FBV0 behavior - being able to edit parked journal entries during the approval process. While it’s a bit different in the cloud version, this functionality can still be achieved with the right setup.

 

Here’s what we recommend:

1. Set up the two-step approval workflow

Make sure the workflow includes:

  • Step 1: Requester creates and submits the journal entry
  • Step 2: Processor reviews and posts it

This is done using the "Manage Workflows for General Journal Entry Verification" app.

2. Allow processors to make changes before posting

 

In the workflow step settings for the processor:

  • Check the option to “Allow changes to journal entry”

This lets the processor open the parked entry, make necessary changes (like adjusting amounts, text, cost centers, etc.), and then post it — similar to what FBV0 allowed before.

3. Role check

 

The processor needs to have the role SAP_BR_JOURNALENTRY_PROCESSOR assigned to be able to do this.

 

I hope this will help answer your question.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: BAdI to change PMP0 value of PO Item
entry.content: Hi Khaing Zin, what is this custom BO about? why you maintain the price in it? Does it will be assigned to PO? If yes, then you can create new condition table based on this custom BO`s ID and make this new condition table maintainable in condition type PMP0, and go to create PMP0 price. In the end, new PMP0 price will be consumed during creating PO.

entry.title: Re: How to do background scheduling with clean core, including Fiori apps, replacing se38 reports
entry.content:
Hello @mlauber,

Yes, we are operating in a public cloud environment.

In the context of scheduling application jobs via the Fiori app, I would appreciate your expert guidance on best practices, particularly from an audit and compliance standpoint. Specifically, we are looking for recommendations around:

  • Restrictions or controls for business users in Production

  • Governance or compliance expectations for job execution permissions

  • Whether job execution should be centrally controlled via templates or technical IDs

Also, could you clarify which teams should be involved pragmatically in the design and enablement of this setup? We believe Security & Authorization, Basis, and potentially Governance teams need to align before go-live, but would welcome your expert input to ensure a compliant and scalable setup.

Thanks again 🙂

entry.title: Re: 2EETW000 Table E071: Duplicate record during array in...
entry.content:
Hello,

I got the following during the upgrade

2EETW125 SQL error "-51" during "E071" access: "POS(1) Lock request timeout"
2EETW000 Table E071: Duplicate record during array insert occured.

What helped was to set the Parallel Import Process Uptime to 1 in the SUM Utilites. Then the phase ran successfully.

Hope this helps someone who is still looking for it.

BR
Andrej

entry.title: Re: Unable to Retrieve Business Data in Custom Inbound AP...
entry.content:
Hi AN,

in order to use ADT Data Preview you need assigned SAP_BR_DEVELOPER role or corresponding business catalog. Please make sure that SAP_BR_DEVELOPER role is assigned to your user. Please also check whether Read Access restrictions are set to "Unrestricted" in the business role. Refer to: Getting Started as a Developer in the ABAP Environment
With this you should have authorization for data preview in development tenant in development system.
In case you need to use ADT data preview in system/tenant other than development tenant, you need business role with corresponding business catalog assigned.
To further investigate what authorizations are missing and which business roles include the same, you may use Display Authorization Trace app. Refer to: Troubleshooting
Also check Customer Data Browser app in case you need data preview in non-development system: Customer Data Browser

Regards,
Peter

entry.title: Access to your data in S/4HANA Cloud Public edition after end of contract
entry.content:
I have a customer that is currently on a 2-system landscape, and wants to re-implement on a 3-system landscape with a new contract. This means that they will close the contract of the 2-system landscape of S/4HANA Cloud Public. 

The customer has the requirement to have their data accessible for audit purposes at least for the next couple of years. What tools or what does SAP offer for these customers, how to store or get access to their data?

entry.title: Re: SAC – Integrated Financial Planning – DRIVER6 & alloc...
entry.content:
Hi @Aleque,

I assume you're working with an OnPremise backend, correct? What is your release version?
This information would be very helpfull to guide you further.

Please check if the C_SKF_SRV OData Service is active.

Please understand that the Integrated Financial Planning business content is sample content and it's not delivered with all possible import jobs. Nevertheless you can use the information in the SAP Help portal to setup your own import jobs.

Best regards
Susanne

entry.title: Re: Working with the new My Timesheet App Version 4 (F3074A) and tasks time-reporting in PPM Project
entry.content:
Thanks Abdul for summarizing the features of V4 CATS as they relate to project management. 

For usage of the Badi HRFIO_B_TSH_FUNCTIONAL to display project attributes directly in the table view, Note https://me.sap.com/notes/3595715 contains sample code.

Regards, Andrea

entry.title: Custom fields are not visible in screen maintain business partner.
entry.content:
Unable to Add Custom fields in the Maintain Business Partner App


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Custom fields are not visible in screen maintain busi...
entry.content:
The Maintain Business Partner app cannot support custom fields, For maintaining the custom fields use the Business Partner Fiori apps (Manage Business Partner Master Data, Manage Customer Master Data and Manage Supplier Master Data).

Refer this KBA for more details : Unable to Add Custom fields in the Maintain Business Partner App

entry.title: Cant Download Base64 Files in SAP Build Apps on Mobile? It only take 1 min to do, Vote to Fix It!!
entry.content:
I’ve raised a feature request on the SAP Influence portal to enable Base64 file downloads in native mobile apps (Android/iOS) using SAP Build Apps. As of now, this functionality is only supported on web apps, which limits real-world mobile use cases like:

✅ Downloading PDFs, receipts, reports, CSVs on the go
✅ Offline access for field workers
✅ Handling file attachments directly from CAP/HANA Cloud responses
✅ Avoiding complex native plugin workarounds in a no-code/low-code platform

This improvement would allow smoother file handling from SAP Build Apps → CAP → mobile, making the ecosystem much more developer- and business-friendly.

📌 Please take a moment to upvote the request here:
👉 https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/346243

Let’s show SAP how much the community needs this!

💬 Feel free to drop your thoughts, use cases, or support in the comments below!

#SAPBuildApps #SAPBTP #SAPCAP #HANACloud #LowCode #MobileApps #SAPInfluence #FioriMobile #Base64Download #SAPCommunity SAP Build Apps

entry.title: Re: Production order GR .Document XXXXXXX does not contai...
entry.content: This SAP note talks about purchase orders, while the issue relates to production orders

entry.title: SAP MaxAttention IWS "AI in Sourcing and Procurement" (Virtual, May 6, 2025)
entry.content:
Virtual

May 06, 2025

Agenda

Dear Valued Customer,

We are pleased to invite you to the SAP MaxAttention Innovation Workshop focusing on AI in Sourcing and Procurement taking place virtually on May 6th, 2025. Please find the current agenda here.

The workshop will start with the session that explores the AI capabilities in SAP S/4HANA Sourcing and Procurement, powered by SAP HANA for Machine Learning (ML) and SAP Business Artificial Intelligence (AI). Discover how embedded ML algorithms in SAP HANA can enhance existing business processes, driving greater efficiency and fostering innovation at scale.

Next, the workshop will provide a comprehensive overview of the Innovative Solution Lifecycle Management (ISLM) framework, designed to support SAP S/4HANA embedded scenarios such as Contract Consumption and Prediction of Delivery Date. Participants will explore the strategic role of AI in strengthening the digital core, unlocking opportunities for businesses to stay competitive and meet evolving market demands.

Additionally, the workshop will delve into the Joule AI Copilot, featuring detailed use-case examples for Operational Purchasers, including Purchase Requisition Creation and Purchase Order Change.

Finally, a dedicated session will showcase AI use cases in SAP Ariba, highlighting its latest Joule capabilities.

At the end, the workshop will present the comprehensive SAP MaxAttention service portfolio for AI, designed to support customers in exploring, innovating, and effectively implementing AI capabilities. The session will also highlight how customers can leverage the SAP MaxAttention methodology to develop their Custom AI solutions in collaboration with the SAP Custom Innovation Services organization.

Our Workshops

These sessions and workshop series focus on a specific topic and the purpose is to enable our customers to understand the product portfolio and innovative technologies of SAP in order to drive adoption and consumption. As specifically now, it is more important than ever to help companies to be successful and to respond to changing markets by transforming into intelligent enterprises in the experience economy.

Important

Please note that the 'Attend' button which can be found within this blog post does not serve as a formal registration for the event.

To officially register, please reach out to me, paul.schropp@sap.com and I will ensure that your registration is properly processed.

We look forward to having you join us for our upcoming events and thank you for your understanding!

Your feedback

Feel free to share your feedback and thoughts in the comment section below.

entry.title: Re: How to do background scheduling with clean core, including Fiori apps, replacing se38 reports
entry.content:
Hi again @poojarychetan ,

I'm afraid your questions goes out of scope of this blog post. Please take up compliance, governance and authorization questions with your security team and/or a SAP Security architect.

The simple quick answer I can give is that business users not usually get access to application job apps. But discuss your exact requirement/use-case, as mentioned.

Teams involved again depends on the requirement. It could be Finance or Procurement needing background handling and potentially wanting to see logs/statistics. The parts that I just covered are the developer. When it comes to especially recurring scheduling, that should be checked by whoever is in charge of your systems operations, which then takes us back to the first question, who should be able to do it, and as said, that is not my scope here, thanks 😊

entry.title: Re: An error occurred during the import of fixed asset po...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP community blog.

 

You're getting this error because the transaction you're trying to post happens before the legacy asset transfer date you've set in the system - which is December 31, 2024 for asset 1510 20000025-0.

In SAP, once you've done a legacy transfer, the system doesn't allow you to post anything before that transfer date unless you're doing a mid-year transfer, and even then, it still has to be within the same fiscal year.

Since your transfer date is right at the end of the year (12/31/2024), SAP expects that all new transactions start from January 1, 2025 onward. That’s why your posting is being rejected.

 

What you can do:

Option 1: Adjust your posting date

Just change the posting date of your transaction to any date from 2025 onward. That should fix the issue if you're just trying to record normal activity after the legacy upload.

 

Option 2: If you do need to post something in 2024

Then you'll need to redo your asset legacy transfer as a mid-year transfer (like 30.06.2024 or earlier), and make sure your values reflect that earlier date. This allows you to post things in the second half of 2024.

 

I hope this will help answer your question.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: How to do background scheduling with clean core, including Fiori apps, replacing se38 reports
entry.content:
No Problem @mlauber : This helps 🙂

Thankyou again .

entry.title: Re: Cloud API Enablement - FAQ
entry.content:
Hello @AlexanderRother @OlgaDolinskaja 

We have a requirement where we need to create multiple process orders and as the BAPI_PROCORD_CREATE is not release ( has a CALL-SCREEN in it 😕 ) we call it async in application jobs. 

To display the results, we created few custom entities and read the job logs. 

We're now wondering if the custom entities are considered Tier 1 or Tier 2? Is this approach in line with Clean Core guidelines? 

Thank you,
Lucian

entry.title: Integration Suite - iSeries (AS400) DB2 JDBC connection
entry.content:
Hi

Is it possible to install a JDBC driver to connect to the IBM iSeries DB2 database?

I have not been able to find any such driver which will deploy without the "Message: (deployJdbcDriver)Failed to deploy jdbc driver null for tenant" error message.

The links to the IBM website for drivers db2Driver11.5.4 / db2Driver11.5.5 in Note 3314847 are impossible to navigate.
In addition, there is a rodmap item for Q4 this year, for "JDBC support for IBM AS/400".
However, it isn't clear if this relates only to the Edge Integration Cell or not.
Any clarification much appreciated.
Regards
Steve

entry.title: Re: how shipping pt. get capture in OBD via transfer posting
entry.content:
Hey Jagdeep,

Thanks for sharing the KBA note, this is really helpful, i checked at table T001W and there 0001 is defaulted, I believe this came from assignment of shipping point to plant.

Earlier I tried to delete this from assignment just to ensure what shipping pt will consider in OBD but in next OBD also it was considering as 0001 only. So now i'm quite confuse is this really capturing from shipping pt assignment to plant config or anything else is maintained.

I checked another config suggested by you (define default values for deliveries) and there another shp pt is defined. can you help me here to clear my confusion.

 Thanking you in advance.

entry.title: Premium Engagement Session "Security PE services for SAP Business Data Cloud" (Virtual, May 8, 2025)
entry.content:
Virtual

May 8, 2025

Agenda

Dear Valued Customer,

We are pleased to invite you this year’s third Premium Engagement Session focusing on the important topic “Security PE services for SAP Business Data Cloud”. This event is taking place virtually on May 8, 2025. Check out the detailed agenda here.

We continue these virtual Premium Engagements Sessions, as we can see many companies are very interested in this way of learning, networking, and sharing – after this May session, we have the next session 18 September covering AI & PE Services. Watch out for the invitation.

This year we will also have a Premium Engagement onsite event in Copenhagen on June 11th to 12th for all our PE customers in Nordic & Baltics – SAP MaxAttention, SAP ActiveAttention, and SAP Value Assurance. The owners of the PE engagement will hear more in the coming weeks, and we will have a mix of the latest from SAP combined with customer stories.

In this May event about PE & SAP Business Data Cloud, we will learn about what SAP Business Data Cloud is all about, what it can give your company and what services we have in PE which can help you getting started, including the security side of the BDC. We have several expert speakers, who will be sharing valuable insights and there will be opportunity for raising your questions.

Don't miss this fantastic chance to gain practical insights and network with like-minded professionals who are embarking on SAP Business Data Cloud. We invite you to join us and participate in this engaging discussion. Your presence would add great value to the event.

Our Workshops

These sessions and workshop series focus on a specific topic and the purpose is to enable our customers to understand the product portfolio and innovative technologies of SAP in order to drive adoption and consumption. As specifically now, it is more important than ever to help companies to be successful and to respond to changing markets by transforming into intelligent enterprises in the experience economy.

Important

Please note that the 'Attend' button which can be found within this blog post does not serve as a formal registration for the event.

To officially register, please reach out to me, paul.schropp@sap.com and I will ensure that your registration is properly processed.

We look forward to having you join us for our upcoming events and thank you for your understanding!

Your feedback

Feel free to share your feedback and thoughts in the comment section below.

entry.title: Re: Internal Server Error in SAP Build Work Zone: Seeking Resolution
entry.content: Nice. Kindly mark as resolved. Thanks.

entry.title: Copying Control from sales documents to billing documents in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
In this short blog post, I would like to demonstrate the process of setting up copying control of a custom field value from a sales order to a billing document in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. Here are the steps involved to implement this:

1) Create the Custom Field in the desired business context. In my example, it will be sales document item, and I will proceed to enable the business scenario “Sales Document to Billing Document on Item Level”:

2) Implement the custom logic

    • In the “Custom Logic” app, create a new enhancement implementation for the Custom Logic Extension Point “SD_BIL_DATA_TRANSFER”
    • Add a filter value to identify your implementation: in my example Sales_To_Bill_Copy_Control
    • Implement the custom logic to transfer the field value:
*   Mandatory step for all implementations:
*   Copy the importing parameters to the changing parameters.
    MOVE-CORRESPONDING bil_doc TO bil_doc_res.
    MOVE-CORRESPONDING bil_doc_item TO bil_doc_item_res.
    MOVE-CORRESPONDING bil_doc_item_contr TO bil_doc_item_contr_res.


*   Example field manipulation of billing document item:
* Get custom field value from the reference sales order
 Select single YY1_PSPElement_SDI from I_SalesDocumentItem
    into @DATA(lv_psp_element)
    where salesdocument = @Bil_doc_item-REFERENCESDDOCUMENT and  salesdocumentitem = @Bil_doc_item-REFERENCESDDOCUMENTITEM.
* Writes the value into the billing document item custom field
    bil_doc_item_res-yy1_pspelement_bdi = lv_psp_element.

3) Configure the Data Transfer Routine

    • Access the configuration UI “Define Custom Routines for Data Transfer to Billing Documents” (SSCUI 102865)
    • Add a new entry for the data transfer routine and assign a Routine Number (between 3000000 and 3009999)

 

    • Assign the Enhancement ID (filter value) to the routine number

 

4) Set Up Copying Control

    • Access the configuration UI “Define Copying Control for Sales Document to Billing Document” (SSCUI 102762)
    • Configure the copying control settings for sales document to billing document. In my example, it is for the transfer of data from sales orders to invoices (OR -> F2) on header level. On item level, for service items (TAD) for which billing documents are directly created from the sales orders, assign the routine created in the previous step.

5) Test the Implementation

    • Create a sales order and enter a value in the custom field
    • Create a billing document based on the sales order
    • Verify that the custom field value is copied correctly to the billing document

With this blog post, you should have the tools necessary to setup the data transfer mechanisms involved to facilitate the copying control of custom field values from sales documents to billing documents. The process is similar by using the respective extension points and configuration activities when it comes to the copying control between sales orders, delivery documents and billing documents.

entry.title: Sap business One 2007
entry.content: How to import SQL database from SAP business one 2007 to sap business one 2010? Can anybody help?

entry.title: PT_COR_REQ Entry not updated in infotype 2011 and table TEVEN after Modifying fields in BADI
entry.content:
Hi Expert

I am in a situation where I need to modify the value of ORIGF or update the Value of TERID through BADI PT_COR_REQ while running T-code PTCOR. I have implemented the BADI and using method IF_EX_PT_COR_REQ~POST_VIA_BLOP.

Below is the code I have written to update the value of TERID the table is getting updated here but its not reflecting in Infotype 2011 or in Table TEVEN.

METHOD if_ex_pt_cor_req~post_via_blop.


    DATA: lt_event TYPE TABLE OF ptcor_tevdata_struc,
          ls_event LIKE LINE OF lt_event.

*    ex_tevent_tab = im_tevent_tab.
          lt_event = im_tevent_tab.

    LOOP AT lt_event INTO ls_event.
      ls_event-terid = 'BAC'.
*      MODIFY ex_tevent_tab FROM ls_event INDEX sy-tabix.
      MODIFY lt_event FROM ls_event INDEX sy-tabix.
    ENDLOOP.

    ex_tevent_tab[] = lt_event[].
  ENDMETHOD.

Post Method

Kindly Share your opinion that whether this BADI is suitable for this requirement or I'm doing anything wrong anything else here.  Aside this BADI any other option where I can update or modified the Fields Value that entry should be visible in Infotype 2011 and in Table TEVEN.

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: Error While Marking Delivery Completion Indicator On PO
entry.content:
While attempting to mark the Delivery Completion Indicator on a Purchase Order, the system displays the following error message:

"Material is GR, cannot change Net Price."

It appears that the error is triggered despite no intentional changes being made to the net price. Requesting assistance in resolving this issue or clarification on the cause of this message.

entry.title: Re: Access to your data in S/4HANA Cloud Public edition a...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

When a customer moves from a 2-system to a 3-system landscape in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, it's essentially a reimplementation with a new contract. That means the current system (with the 2-system landscape) will eventually be shut down. Since the customer still needs access to their data for audits or legal reasons, there are a few options SAP provides.

 

What SAP offers for data access after system termination:

1. Data Export from SAP

 

Before the system is shut down, the customer can request a full data export. SAP provides this in a structured XML format, which is legally compliant and can be stored outside of SAP. This export has to be requested through a support ticket on the SAP Launchpad before the tenant is terminated.

2. Read-Only Access

 

SAP may allow the system to stay in read-only mode for a short period (usually up to 3 months) after contract termination. This gives the customer time to manually access, download, or review data. This should also be requested ahead of time through the customer’s SAP contact (Customer Engagement Executive or Customer Success Partner).

3. Store the Data Externally

 

If the customer needs to keep the data accessible in a user-friendly way (not just as raw XML), they can use third-party archiving solutions like OpenText, KGS, or Datavard. These tools can store the exported SAP data securely and make it easier to search or retrieve if needed later.

 

What the customer should do:

1. Get in touch with SAP ASAP to plan the data export and/or request read-only access.

2. Decide where and how they want to store the exported data – internally or using a third-party tool.

3. Make sure they request the export before the system contract ends.

 

I hope this will help answer your question.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Where can I learn make-to-stock (MTS) production processes in event-based Production Accounting?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Evaluating Production Accounting in Make-to-Stock Scenarios in SAP S/4HANA learning journey.

Overview
This essential learning journey covers various Make-to-Stock production processes from the perspective of event-based Production Accounting by Order and by Period. It equips consultants with the knowledge and skills necessary to effectively analyze production processes in SAP S/4HANA Cloud using different cost objects, such as production orders, process orders in joint production scenarios, and product cost collectors.

Learning objectives

  • Explore the MTS production process from a management accounting perspective
  • Identify relevant master data needed in Production Accounting by Order and by Period
  • Evaluate event-based postings to cost objects from different production steps 
  • Learn to analyze production costs, event-based Work-In-Process (WIP) and variance calculation.
  • Explain the error handling process

Prerequisites

  • Introducing Product Cost Planning and Production Accounting in SAP S/HANA

Please post you question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud – Need APIs for Automating Finance Data Uploads (No Manual Entry)

If this is is the case, can you please delete one of your questions to speed up answering of your questions? Thanks very much! Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: S4Cloud: Adobe Form - custom field hardcoded text not displayed on output
entry.content:
Dear Expert Community,

I have an Adobe output form (DEBIT MEMO) in S4Hana public cloud where I have added a field. The field is visible/invisible on the printout as expected, but the hardcoded value of the field remains empty / doesn't display. The caption of the field is correctly displayed (or not) as prompted by the conditions, proving that the active/inactive conditions work correctly. Just the value of the field doesn't get displayed.

The active/inactive condition of this field, as well as the hardcoded value, are controlled by a piece of java code as shown below (in the below, the real Partner number is replaced by XXXXXX):

<script contentType="application/x-javascript">if(this.parent.Partner.rawValue =="XXXXXX") {this.rawValue =="TEST"}; else
{
this.presence = "inactive";
}
</script>

What could be the reason and what could be done? 

Best regards,

Katja

entry.title: Question regarding Deep Links for List View in SAP Service Cloud Version 2
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We have a requirement where we need a hyperlink in a analytical story to navigate to the list view of Cases in SAP Service Cloud Version 2 with specific filters, for example: List View of Cases with Status = 'Open'.

I understand that the deep link for the case view is: https://{tenantURL}/go/list/case  

Is there any way to add parameters to the link such that the list view is filtered? Please do provide your insights.

Thanks in advance,
Karthik C M.

entry.title: Re: Error fiori app generator failed
entry.content:
If you're experiencing issues, please try the following steps:

  1. Ensure only one project folder is open at a time on the left panel — having too many open projects can cause loading issues.

  2. If it's still not working, check if your Dev Space is full — this can prevent the app from functioning properly.

  3. As a final step, try opening the application in Incognito Mode to rule out any browser cache or extension conflicts.

Let me know if the issue persists after these steps!

entry.title: SAP for Me "You do not have a maintenance contract for this installation"
entry.content:
Hi,

While performing an upgrade we ran into an issue where there seems to be an error on SAP for me with regards to our installation number. SAP for me reports back that we do not have a maintenance contract for the installation.  "You do not have a maintenance contract for this installation. Details in KBA " 
License Keys application shows message: You do not have a maintenance contract for this installation - SAP for Me - SAP for Me  we had a look and indeed the installation reports expired on the maintenance agreement but we can't create a temporary maintenance entitlement which is urgently needed for the upgrade to continue and meet the planning with the business. 

Please have a look at the installation number because as we see, we should have a valid contract. 

Regards,









------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP for Me "You do not have a maintenance contract fo...
entry.content:
Dear valued customer,

I understand you are located under Service & Support at License key application. While selecting the installation to extend your key you get the error "You do not have a maintenance contract for this installation". You also might have realized the "Details in KBA " beside that error. By clicking on it you will always find the information on the next steps for such errors. 

In that case I would need you to contact the SAP Contract Department or your responsible SAP Account Representative. Seems like the maintenance frame of the installation needs to be reviewed and corrected.

Following two KBAs helps you guide to that channel.

https://me.sap.com/notes/2626344

https://me.sap.com/notes/1660069

I would love being a help but unfortunately the SAP for Me technical Support Team does not have any access rights to maintain contract data.

Best wishes Dragana

SAP Support SAP for Me.

entry.title: Real-Time Configuration Progress Tracker in SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
While exploring SAP Learning Hub, I noticed a powerful yet simple UX feature — real-time tracking of progress. It shows learners how many topics they’ve completed, how many are left, and even displays a clean progress bar. This got me thinking…

Why don’t we have something similar inside SAP SuccessFactors?

As consultants, partners, and administrators, we often work across modules like:

  • Compensation

  • Performance and Goals (PMGM)

  • Employee Central (EC)

  • Onboarding, and more…

But there’s no built-in progress tracker to visually reflect how much of the configuration or project setup is completed during implementation or maintenance. Imagine if we could see a simple status like:

6 of 10 key configuration items completed
Progress: 60%
Pending: Eligibility rules, Route Map, EC Integration

if this could be done then it will reduce multiple clicks and improve SAP ecosystem

Benefits of a Real-Time Configuration Progress Tracker in SAP SuccessFactors

 Benefit Area  Description
Visibility & TransparencyClearly shows what’s configured vs. pending. No more scattered status updates.
Implementation EfficiencyKeeps consultants, admins, and PMs aligned. Faster go-lives, fewer blockers.
Customer ConfidenceClients can monitor progress visually in real time. Builds trust and clarity.
Agile EnablementSupports iterative delivery, sprint-based rollouts, and milestone tracking.
Error ReductionStandardized checklists prevent missing key setup steps.
Post-Go-Live UseUseful for ongoing maintenance, updates, and change requests.
Team CollaborationAll module owners see the same live status. Improves cross-functional flow.
GamificationAdd motivation through visual progress bars and milestone badges.
UX AlignmentMatches SAP Learning Hub’s intuitive learner UX. User-first for admins too.

 

Suggest me your ideas as well, i am new to the role and exploring SAP successfactor.

entry.title: Credit Limit Error When Creating Sales Order for Extended Sales Org
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a scenario related to SAP Credit Management and would appreciate your guidance.

I have a customer initially created under Sales Organization 2000 with Credit Segment 2000. I assigned a credit limit of 1000, and everything works fine — for example:

  • If I create a sales order of 900, it's saved successfully.

  • If I try to create an order of 1100, the system blocks it due to exceeding the credit limit, which is expected and working as intended.

Now, I extended the same customer to another Sales Organization 4000, and assigned Credit Segment 4000 with a credit limit of 5000.

However, when I try to create a sales order of 1600 in Sales Org 4000, the system throws an error saying that the credit limit is exceeded — even though the credit limit under Credit Segment 4000 is set to 5000.

Can anyone help me understand why this is happening? Am I missing some configuration or master data dependency that is causing the system to still consider the old credit segment or combine limits?

Thanks in advance for your help!

Faraz Ali.

entry.title: Re: TABSTRIP PROBLEM
entry.content:
The syntax error message says that you have a screen element that doesn't have a name. So... if you navigate to the element list, and look at line 8 of that list, you're bound to see a screen element that is missing the name.

If this doesn't help you solve it by yourself, a screenshot of the element list would be helpful.

entry.title: Where can I start learning how to configure and manage emission management processes within SAP EHS?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Configuring, Managing, and Integrating Emission Processes in SAP learning journey.

Overview
Learn how to configure and manage emission management processes within SAP EHS, including setting up master data, monitoring and tracking emission data, and ensuring compliance with environmental regulations and standards. Additionally, gain the skills to integrate SAP EHS Management, environment management data with SAP Reporting and Analytics solutions, such as SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Sustainability Control Tower.

Learning objectives

  • Comprehend the Emission Management Process in depth. 
  • Integrate SAP EHS Management, environment management with Reporting and Analytics Solutions. 
  • Prepare and Manage Master Data. 

Please post you question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

I'm not that fit in Javascript via Adobe Forms, but it seems suspicious that you have two '=' signs. Maybe you can try = 'TEST' instead of == 'TEST'.

Does your logic even reach the If statement? There are many ways to fetch the parent values. Maybe you have to change that part. There is a way to fetch it via strings.. maybe that works.

Hope that helps

entry.title: Re: TABSTRIP PROBLEM
entry.content: You are right, I fixed it. Thank you

entry.title: Re: S4Cloud: Adobe Form - custom field hardcoded text not...
entry.content: Hi Fabienne, Thanks for the suggestion! The double "=" -signs are as instructed by Java syntax, and they are successfully used that way in numerous other places in our output forms. Sometimes, I have seen even === recommended, but I usually stick to ==. I do think the if-statement is reached because I can see the caption displayed if the condition Partner = XXXXXX is met, and - converserly - not displayed if this condition isn't met. Also, I should add that the field length for the value is 20 characters and the value itself is less. The other properties of the field are identical with other fields that do work correctly.

entry.title: Changing Quota value in a Quota arrangement not applying new percentages correctly.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am experiencing an issue where a change is made to the Quota values in a quota arrangement (via MEQ1) but the planned order creation after the change does not appear to work correctly.  The problem appears that some residual quantity remains in the Allocated quantity field and this is then redistributed when MRP reads the quota arrangement.

Example

Product A has a quota arrangement with a Quota of 50 for production version ABCD and a Quota of 50 for production version ZYXW.

There are demands for 100,000 units in the system

The allocated quantity for each PV in the Quota is 75,000 units.

So there is a residual 50,000 units (2 x 75,000 - 100,000) in the allocated quantity.

When MRP is run the planned orders are evenly split between the two production versions.

If I now change the Quota to be 80 for ABCD and 20 for ZYXW and run MRP. 

The residual quantity appears to still be applied so the planned orders are initially all for production version ABCD, then after the system equalises itself they go to an 80/20 ratio.  It appears that as the historical distribution of the PV's was 50/50 the system now uses ABCD 100% until an 80/20 ratio for the whole horizon is reached.

I have tried MEQB to process the revision.  I have also tried Edit >  Base Quantities > Collective Calculation and Edit > Reset   (in MEQ1) to try and have the new quota percentage applied immediately irrespective on the history.

The only way I can make the new quota arrangement percentages to be applied to current and future demands is to delete the quota arrangement with MEQ7 and then creating a new one.  Am I missing something?  Can anyone explain where the residual quantity in the quota arrangement comes from and why it would be redistributed upon an update?

Thanks in Advance,

Jez

entry.title: Re: Error While Marking Delivery Completion Indicator On PO
entry.content: Please share the screen shot of the error with message number

entry.title: Using a Function Module in SAP RAP managed
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I'm trying my best to use the FM BAPI_USER_CREATE1 so i'll be able to create a user on S/4, since i'm working in a managed scenario i have implemented a determination on save so when a new record is created a method that is using BAPI_USER_CREATE1 will be triggered as shown below

determination createUser on save {create;}

 

METHOD CreateUser.
  READ ENTITIES OF zi_user1_rh IN LOCAL MODE
    ENTITY User
    ALL FIELDS WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
    RESULT DATA(entites).

    LOOP AT entites INTO DATA(entity).
      DATA: ls_address TYPE bapiaddr3.
      ls_address-firstname = entity-Firstname.
      ls_address-lastname = entity-Lastname.
      DATA: ls_logondata TYPE bapilogond.
      ls_logondata-ustyp = 'A'.
      DATA: lv_password TYPE bapipwd VALUE '27456520Recon..',
            lv_username TYPE bapibname-bapibname.
      lv_username = entity-Username.

    ENDLOOP.
    CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_USER_CREATE1'
      IN UPDATE TASK
      EXPORTING
        username  = lv_username
        logondata = ls_logondata
        password  = lv_password
        address   = ls_address.

  ENDMETHOD.

PS: Please ignore the password that is being mentioned directly in the code as i'm still testing 
Unfortunately that didn't work and i got the below st22 dump.

So i decided to take a different approach, so i create a different method which the same logic as the previous one and made it executable via an action button as shown below

action CreateUser result[1] $self;

However i'm still getting exactly the same dump, i came across many blogs like the below one which indicates that a validation or a determination should work with a FM in a managed scenario.
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/adding-custom-code-function-module-in-managed-scenario-sap-abap-rap/qaq-p/12617692/comment-id/4732597#M4732597 
And recommendations please ?

entry.title: Re: S4Cloud: Adobe Form - custom field hardcoded text not...
entry.content: Hi Katja, got it. Does the code check work? Maybe you have to put the semicolon directly after the "TEST" Like that: == "TEST"; }

entry.title: Re: How to Read Data Stored in SAP Datasphere from SAP BW Bridge
entry.content:
@pankaj_singh21:

Q1: Thanks for the hint. I have updated the screenshot.  

Q2: Are you referring to a data preview on the CDS view? It seems there are some restrictions on previewing CDS views with external entities. You can still preview the data by creating and running an ABAP class, as shown in step 8. I hope this helps.

entry.title: Re: how to set a filter "field = empty " in FIORI App man...
entry.content: hi sohailkhan, not sure what filter property you mean. Could you, plese, kindly provide me details on that? E.g. screenshot or similar?
